title: Notification from Power BI

posts.author: divesy (Darren)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Probably a question with an obvious answer but i have searched and not found much.

We have a power bi dashboard which takes in data from monday, and other sources, and would like to be send a notification to monday members (by button press to start with). Is it possible to (use the monday API to) send send a notification from power bi?

thanks.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @divesy and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

I have no experience with Power BI and I hope someone who uses it can give you information on that end.

On monday’s end, if you can use Power BI to send an HTTP request, you can use our API as explained here to create notification for specific users.

Cheers,
Matias
